name: US Cash Advance
description_short: US Cash Advance offers payday loans, cash advances, and bad credit loans up to $50K with same-day funding at a Detroit location. Accepts all credit types with minimal paperwork.
description_long:
US Cash Advance operates a physical lending location at 20002 Schoolcraft Rd in Detroit, Michigan, offering emergency cash solutions to consumers who need quick access to funds. The company has been reviewed positively by customers citing fast approval processes and helpful staff, particularly a staff member named Doris who is mentioned in multiple customer reviews for patient and transparent service. Their service hours span 8am-9pm weekdays and 10am-7pm weekends, accommodating working customers. The company positions itself as accessible to consumers with imperfect credit histories, emphasizing that bad credit is not a barrier to approval.

US Cash Advance provides multiple loan products including payday loans ($1,000 or less), bad credit loans ($250-$50,000), same-day loans, cash advances, and personal loans. All products are unsecured loans available to borrowers with all credit types. The company advertises a streamlined application process involving an online form, connection with third-party lenders, offer review, contract signing, and same-day or rapid cash disbursement. They promote benefits including fast access to cash, no collateral requirements, minimal paperwork, and the ability to use funds for any purpose.

What distinguishes US Cash Advance is their in-person service model combined with rapid processing. Customer reviews specifically highlight the speed of the application process (one customer received funds within 2 hours; another completed the entire process in 45 minutes). The company emphasizes transparency around terms and fees, with reviewers noting the absence of hidden fees. The physical location allows for face-to-face interaction and immediate questions to be answered by staff, which some customers found reassuring for their first loan experience.

An honest assessment reveals several limitations. Customer reviews suggest operational constraints including cramped waiting areas, indicating capacity issues. The company's online presence appears to funnel applicants to third-party lenders rather than providing direct lending, raising questions about actual underwriting and rate transparency. The website lacks specific APR information, repayment terms, or fee disclosures—critical details for emergency loan products. While customers report positive experiences, the lack of disclosed pricing makes it impossible to verify whether rates are competitive or compliant with state regulations. This is a traditional storefront lender operating in the high-cost emergency lending space.
address: 819 S Country Club Dr #1106, Mesa, AZ 85210

company_info.headquarters: 819 S Country Club Dr #1106, Mesa, AZ 85210

pros: Same-day or rapid cash disbursement (2-hour turnaround documented in reviews)
In-person service with trained staff (specifically praised for patience and clear explanations)
Accepts all credit types including bad credit—no credit check loans available
Transparent service model per customer reviews—staff explicitly explained repayment terms with no hidden fees mentioned
Extended hours (8am-9pm weekdays, 10am-7pm weekends) accommodating working customers
Loan amounts up to $50,000 for bad credit products (broader than typical payday loans)
cons: No online APR, rates, or fee information disclosed on website—critical pricing transparency missing
Operates through third-party lender connections rather than direct lending, creating middleman uncertainty
Physical location only (Detroit) limits accessibility; website suggests this is one storefront
Customer review mentions cramped waiting area, suggesting operational/capacity constraints
No mention of state regulatory compliance or licensing information on website
best_for: Consumers in Detroit needing emergency cash within hours who prefer in-person service
Borrowers with bad credit or thin credit files rejected by traditional lenders
Individuals facing unexpected expenses who value transparent staff communication over online convenience
diagnosis: US Cash Advance is best for Detroit-area consumers with damaged credit who need emergency cash today and prefer face-to-face interaction with staff. The critical caveat is the complete absence of disclosed APRs, fees, or repayment terms—customers cannot comparison-shop or verify affordability before committing, and the third-party lender model creates uncertainty about actual terms and regulatory oversight.
